message:
fix(cli): register newTimelineCmd() so `ntm timeline` is available

timeline.go has defined the command and its subcommands (list/show/delete/
cleanup/export/stats) since early development, but newTimelineCmd() was
never added to rootCmd.AddCommand — `ntm timeline ...` errored with
"unknown command". This single-line addition wires it up under the session
persistence group.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -3937,6 +3937,7 @@ func init() {
 		newSessionPersistCmd(),
 		newHandoffCmd(),
 		newResumeCmd(),
+		newTimelineCmd(),
 
 		// Utilities
 		newOverlayCmd(),
